market_snapshot.top_volume_spike: HYPE (Hyperliquid) — near all-time high $76.70, ETF options launch driving volume
market_snapshot.dominant_narrative: Bitcoin slides below $60K on record ETF outflows while Hyperliquid diverges with ATH; institutional ETF ecosystem (THYP, BHYP, HYPG) driving selective altcoin demand

selected_keyword.why: HYPE hit all-time high of $76.70 on June 16, 2026; 21Shares launched weekly/monthly ETF options (THYP) on June 22 adding fresh institutional signal; $153M inflows across three ETFs (THYP, BHYP, HYPG) with no dedicated Persian-language article covering this ETF ecosystem — strong gap at a moment of maximum search interest
